title: Example Product (delete me)
description: This file demonstrates how Decap CMS writes a product into content/products/. Delete it or replace it via the /admin/ UI.
longDescription: Each entry is one JSON file in this directory. Adding a new product via /admin/ creates a new file here automatically — you don't need to touch products.js any more. The legacy products.js entries still load too, so nothing breaks during the transition.
story: When Decap saves an entry it commits to this repo over the GitHub API. GitHub Pages then rebuilds; visitors fetch the new file directly on next page-load via content-loader.js.

faq.a: Yes — either through /admin/ or by removing the file from the repo.
